2603.25462.title: Temporally Decoupled Diffusion Planning for Autonomous Driving
2603.25462.paper_summary: Motion planning in dynamic urban environments requires balancing immediate safety with long-term goals. While diffusion models effectively capture multi-modal decision-making, existing approaches treat trajectories as monolithic entities, overlooking heterogeneous temporal dependencies where near-term plans are constrained by instantaneous dynamics and far-term plans by navigational goals. To address this, we propose Temporally Decoupled Diffusion Model (TDDM), which reformulates trajectory generation via a noise-as-mask paradigm. By partitioning trajectories into segments with independent noise levels, we implicitly treat high noise as information voids and weak noise as contextual cues. This compels the model to reconstruct corrupted near-term states by leveraging internal correlations with better-preserved temporal contexts. Architecturally, we introduce a Temporally Decoupled Adaptive Layer Normalization (TD-AdaLN) to inject segment-specific timesteps. During inference, our Asymmetric Temporal Classifier-Free Guidance utilizes weakly noised far-term priors to guide immediate path generation. Evaluations on the nuPlan benchmark show TDDM approaches or exceeds state-of-the-art baselines, particularly excelling in the challenging Test14-hard subset.
2603.25462.paper_summary_zh: 在動態城市環境中的運動規劃需要平衡即時安全與長期目標。雖然擴散模型有效捕捉多模態決策，但現有方法將軌跡視為單一實體，忽略了異質的時間依賴性，其中短期計劃受到瞬時動力學的限制，而長期計劃則受到導航目標的限制。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了時間解耦擴散模型（TDDM），通過噪聲作為掩碼的範式重新構建軌跡生成。通過將軌跡劃分為具有獨立噪聲水平的段，我們隱式地將高噪聲視為信息空白，而將弱噪聲視為上下文線索。這迫使模型通過利用與保存較好的時間上下文的內部相關性來重建受損的短期狀態。在架構上，我們引入了時間解耦自適應層正則化（TD-AdaLN）來注入特定段的時間步。在推理過程中，我們的非對稱時間分類器無引導利用弱噪聲的長期先驗來指導即時路徑生成。在nuPlan基準上的評估顯示，TDDM的方法達到或超過了最先進的基準，特別是在具有挑戰性的Test14-hard子集上表現優異。
2603.25462.author: Xiang Li et.al.
2603.25462.authors: Xiang Li, Bikun Wang, John Zhang, Jianjun Wang
